title: Dependency Injection
subtitle: Angular's powerful DI system — providers, tokens, hierarchical injectors
description: Angular's DI system is one of its most powerful and misunderstood features. Master how the injector tree works, how to configure providers, when to use InjectionTokens, and how the inject() function modernizes DI in Angular 14+.
learningOutcomes: Explain how Angular's hierarchical injector tree resolves dependencies
Configure providers using useClass, useValue, useFactory, and useExisting
Create and use InjectionTokens for non-class dependencies
Understand the difference between root, module, and component-level providers
Use the inject() function as a modern alternative to constructor injection
